profile.name: Rohan Sehgal
profile.backing: Backed by Y Combinator and Khosla Ventures

philosophy: These are the guiding principles that I live by:
1. Make a difference while doing cools things
2. Take on risk and embrace the pressure
3. The people make the place and the place makes the people
values: Founding engineer at Broccoli, #3 employee. Today, we're a team of 23 people and have raised a $25M Series A led by Khosla Ventures.
Built systems that now process millions of calls and serve 400+ enterprise customers. In the last year, we've gone from 0 - 10M+ with a team of 4 engineers and grown 25% MoM
We are incredibly lean and scrappy. If this excites you and you would like to be a part of the early team, we're hiring! Check us out at https://www.broccoli.com/careers
